title: Qearioz's Optimized PvP & SMP
description: Qearioz's Modpack specifically made for PvP and SMP
body:
# QEARIOZ MODPACK
> - **INFO:** This pack focuses on delivering a lightweight, SMP-friendly experience that bridges the gap between classic gameplay and high-tier performance. It’s a carefully balanced collection of Vanilla+ enhancements and optimizations designed to improve exploration, day-to-day survival, and the competitive PvP experience. all while keeping that authentic Minecraft feel.
> 
>    I built this pack for players who want a clean, polished foundation for long-term servers. It smooths out the rough edges of the game and boosts your frames without ever crossing the line of feeling over-modded.


<details>
<summary>HOW TO INSTALL</summary>

## HOW TO INSTALL:
> 1. Download the Modrinth App.
>   
> 2. Search for **Qearioz Modpack** and click Install.
>   
> 3. Run the instance, check your keybinds, and jump in!
>   
> - **RAM ALLOCATION:** Because this pack includes heavy optimizations and competitive PvP tweaks, it is recommended to use 4GB to 6GB of RAM. This ensures your game stays buttery smooth even during intense combat or while exploring new chunks.

</details>

  

<details>
<summary>WHAT’S INSIDE</summary>

## WHAT’S INSIDE:
> - **Performance First:** A deep suite of optimization mods to maximize your FPS and minimize stutter.
>  
> - **PvP Ready:** Enhanced responsiveness and UI tweaks for a competitive edge in combat.
> 
> - **Vanilla+ Feel:** Subtle quality-of-life improvements that make survival more intuitive without changing the core game.
> 
> - **SMP Optimized:** Lightweight enough for any server, ensuring stability for long-term play.

</details>


<details>
<summary>HOW TO GET MOVING EYES</summary>

## HOW TO GET MOVING EYES:
